task: Fix issue 2205: Copilot CLI hook commands resolved scripts via cwd-relative ./hooks/... and failed because cwd is the user's working directory, not the plugin install location

events.content: Issue #2205: Copilot CLI preToolUse/sessionStart hooks failed on Windows with 'can't open file C:\Users\user\hooks\sessionStart\...py: No such file or directory'. The generated hooks.json invoked scripts via python3 -u "./hooks/<event>/<script>.py" with cwd ".", which Copilot CLI resolves against the user's working directory, not the vendored plugin install location.

Real-world Copilot CLI plugins (prp-core, dx-core, nowledge-mem, worktale) anchor hook commands with ${COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT}; GitHub docs confirm Copilot exposes ${COPILOT_PLUGIN_DATA} with ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA} alias. pytest tests/build_scripts/test_generate_hooks.py -> 91 passed.
